title: After the Sprinters S.: My Stage

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I pull off a fantastic performance! It's just like
Trainer said—I really am suited for sprints!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O and Zephyr even acknowledge me as
their rival. I can't wait to run with them again! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I decide to take on the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen next, which is another
G1 race. I think we've both grown a lot. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure a wonderful future is waiting for us! I have
a good feeling about things!
